name: Merry Christmas Molasses Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix brown sugar, shortening, and molasses.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
4. Heat oven to 375 degrees.
5. Roll dough 1/2 inch thick on a lightly floured cloth-covered board.
6. Cut into desired shapes with cookie cutters.
7. Place about 1 inch apart on lightly greased cookie sheets.
8. Bake until no indentation remains when touched, about 7 to 8 minutes; cool.
9. Frost and decorate as desired.
10. Makes 5 dozen 3-inch cookies.
